user.title: Amazing Irrigation
user.description: Set up Amazing Irrigation. After installation you can add Irrigation Zones from the integration's configuration.

init.title: Irrigation Zones
init.description: Add, edit or remove Irrigation Zones.

add_zone.title: Add an Irrigation Zone
add_zone.description: An Irrigation Zone observes one or more soil moisture sensors and typed environmental and safety inputs. This zone cannot water yet.

data.name: Zone name
data.safety_blockers: Safety Blockers (block watering when on or unavailable)

edit_zone.title: Edit an Irrigation Zone
edit_zone.description: Select a zone to edit, then adjust its inputs.

data.name: Zone name
data.safety_blockers: Safety Blockers (block watering when on or unavailable)

error.no_moisture_sensors: Select at least one soil moisture sensor for the zone.

evaluate_zone.name: Evaluate zone
evaluate_zone.description: Create a Run Request for one or more Irrigation Zones and return the Irrigation Decision without watering.

entity_id.name: Irrigation Decision sensor(s)
entity_id.description: The Irrigation Decision sensor entities to evaluate.

force.name: Force water
force.description: Bypass soft checks (still respects Safety Blockers).
